entries.message: This looks like Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet API code. You are writing Mog code.
entries.suggestion: Do not wrap Mog code in Excel.run or Office.onReady. Use the injected `wb` / `ws` objects, or create a workbook with `createWorkbook(...)` at the SDK boundary.

mogReplacements.snippet:
import { createWorkbook } from '@mog-sdk/sdk';
const wb = await createWorkbook();
mogReplacements.note: Root SDK factory, not a workbook member path.

entries.message: Office host globals are not available in Mog code.
entries.suggestion: Use the Mog SDK workbook object and host integration outside the code execution sandbox.

entries.message: Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet proxy load/sync code is not part of the Mog API.
entries.suggestion: Mog APIs return real values directly. Await the Mog method that reads or writes the data you need.

entries.message: This active worksheet access comes from the Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet API, not Mog.
entries.suggestion: Use `const ws = wb.activeSheet;` for the active worksheet.

entries.message: Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet worksheet collection calls are not Mog worksheet access.
entries.suggestion: Use `await wb.getSheet(name)` when the sheet must exist, `await wb.findSheet(name)` for nullable lookup, or `wb.sheetNames` / `await wb.getSheets()` for listing.

entries.message: Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet range proxy assignment does not write data in Mog.
entries.suggestion: Use `await ws.setRange(range, values)` for range writes.

entries.message: Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet range proxy reads require load/sync; Mog reads return values directly.
Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet range navigation helpers do not map one-for-one to Mog APIs.
entries.suggestion: Choose the Mog range API that matches the intent: used range, current region, data edge, or address/index conversion.

entries.message: Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet range formatting properties are not Mog formatting calls.
entries.suggestion: Use the worksheet formats API with an explicit range and format object.

mogReplacements.snippet: await ws.formats.setCellProperties([{ row: 0, col: 0, format: { bold: true } }]);
mogReplacements.note: Use cell properties for per-cell format matrices.

entries.message: Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet table collection calls use a different table API shape.
entries.suggestion: Use `await ws.tables.add(range, { name, hasHeaders })` and worksheet table row helpers.

mogReplacements.snippet: const table = await ws.tables.add("A1:C10", { name, hasHeaders: true });

entries.message: Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet filter and sort calls are not Mog filter APIs.
entries.suggestion: Use worksheet filter APIs or `ws.sortRange(...)` with explicit ranges and criteria.

mogReplacements.snippet: await ws.sortRange("A1:C10", { columns: [{ columnIndex: 0, ascending: true }], hasHeaders: true });

entries.message: Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet named item APIs do not exist in Mog.
entries.suggestion: Use the Mog workbook or worksheet names APIs.

entries.message: Microsoft Office JavaScript spreadsheet document file APIs are host APIs, not Mog file I/O.
entries.suggestion: Use Mog workbook save/export APIs or create workbooks through the SDK.

mogReplacements.note: Root SDK factory, not a workbook member path.

entries.behavior: Worksheet-scoped chart ID inputs first try the exact ID, then resolve numeric imported aliases such as chart-import-0 to the current sheet-qualified canonical ID. Returned IDs and persisted state remain canonical.
First-party chart-not-found hints must name ws.charts.list() and api.describe("ws.charts"), not the learned root alias.

diagnostics.message: Use ws.charts.list() or api.describe("ws.charts") to enumerate worksheet charts.

entries.behavior: The old addChart return contract is not promoted as a hidden shim; learned calls are diagnosed to ws.charts.add(config).

diagnostics.message: ws.addChart(config) is not part of the compatibility runtime. Use ws.charts.add(config).

entries.behavior: Deprecated root chart getter delegates to ws.charts.get(chartId).

diagnostics.message: ws.getChart(id) is deprecated. Use ws.charts.get(id).

entries.behavior: Deprecated root chart listing alias delegates to ws.charts.list(options?).

diagnostics.message: ws.listCharts() is deprecated. Use ws.charts.list() for canonical chart listing.

entries.behavior: Deprecated root chart remover delegates to ws.charts.remove(chartId).

diagnostics.message: ws.removeChart(id) is deprecated. Use ws.charts.remove(id).

entries.behavior: Deprecated root chart updater delegates to ws.charts.update(chartId, updates).

diagnostics.message: ws.updateChart(id, updates) is deprecated. Use ws.charts.update(id, updates).

entries.behavior: WorksheetPivots.setItemVisibility(name, fieldId, visibleItems) delegates to setPivotItemVisibility with identical filters, refresh policy, errors, and readbacks.
Handle describe() is intentionally not added in the pilot; agents should use handle.getInfo() for structured pivot introspection.

diagnostics.message: Pivot handles do not expose describe(); use handle.getInfo() for structured pivot introspection.

entries.behavior: Pivot handles expose side-effect-free getInfo() bound to the pivot ID captured when the handle was created.
Displayed blank pivot items round-trip to the canonical blank source key for Null, empty string, and whitespace-only strings without colliding with literal "(blank)" text.
Deprecated root pivot creation alias delegates to ws.pivots.add(config).

diagnostics.message: ws.addPivotTable(config) is deprecated. Use ws.pivots.add(config).

entries.behavior: Deprecated root pivot getter alias delegates to ws.pivots.get(name).

diagnostics.message: ws.getPivotTable(name) is deprecated. Use ws.pivots.get(name).

entries.behavior: Deprecated root pivot listing alias delegates to ws.pivots.list().

diagnostics.message: ws.listPivotTables() is deprecated. Use ws.pivots.list().

entries.behavior: Deprecated root pivot removal alias delegates to ws.pivots.remove(name).

diagnostics.message: ws.removePivotTable(name) is deprecated. Use ws.pivots.remove(name).

entries.behavior: Address conversion helpers are workbook APIs; worksheets do not expose addressToIndex().

diagnostics.message: ws.addressToIndex(address) is not a Mog worksheet method. Use wb.addressToIndex(address).

entries.behavior: Calling describeRange with no range or undefined describes the used range with the same empty-sheet and large-sheet safeguards as describe(), while preserving includeStyle.
Worksheet does not expose getCellValue(); use ws.getValue(address) for the computed value or (await ws.getCell(address)).value when full cell data is needed.

diagnostics.message: ws.getCellValue(address) is not a Mog worksheet method. Use await ws.getValue(address), or (await ws.getCell(address)).value when full cell data is needed.

entries.behavior: Worksheet.getCharts(options?) is a typed public alias for Worksheet.charts.list(options?) with identical ordering, materialization behavior, and returned Chart records.
Worksheet formatting reads are namespaced under ws.formats; use displayed properties for effective formatting or ws.formats.get() for explicit stored formatting.

diagnostics.message: ws.getFormat(address) is not a Mog worksheet method. Use ws.formats.getDisplayedCellProperties(address) for effective formatting, or ws.formats.get(address) for explicit stored formatting.

entries.behavior: Address conversion helpers are workbook APIs; worksheets do not expose indexToAddress().

diagnostics.message: ws.indexToAddress(row, col) is not a Mog worksheet method. Use wb.indexToAddress(row, col).

entries.behavior: Private worksheet/helper guesses such as _colLetter are not public Mog APIs; use workbook address helpers where possible.

diagnostics.message: ws._colLetter(index) is not a public Mog worksheet method. Use wb.indexToAddress(row, col) when converting indexes to addresses.

entries.behavior: Worksheet raw cell data reads use ws.getRawCellData(address); there is no ws.rawCellData() shortcut.

diagnostics.message: ws.rawCellData(address) is not a Mog worksheet method. Use await ws.getRawCellData(address).
